# Test Fixtures

These files are active test inputs. They should reflect the current test
contract, even when they were originally copied from archived material.

`workflows/` contains graph workflow payloads used by the workflow truth suites.
Do not point active tests at `docs/archive/workspace/`; archive files are kept
only for historical reference.

`catalogs/` contains active node catalog snapshots used by generated test plans
and residual gap suites.
